planSummary: Manual QA of /intake-forms list + create/edit/delete pages.
runSummary: Chrome DevTools MCP session on localhost:5103 with empty seed.

cases.text: Navigate to /intake-forms. Expect 200, PageHeader, StatsGrid (3 cards — documented exception), DataTable. Observed: renders correctly but page is missing breadcrumbs (does not follow Page Anatomy Law).

cases.summary: Create form UI loads with info panel + one default field
cases.text: Click 'إنشاء نموذج'. Expect form with info panel (nameAr/nameEn/type/scope/isActive) and a default field.

cases.summary: Create submit succeeds for valid global pre_booking form
cases.text: Fill nameAr='اختبار QA', nameEn='QA Test', default field, submit. Expect POST 201. Observed: POST 400 — backend DTO (CreateIntakeFormDto) only accepts nameAr/nameEn/fields; frontend sends type, scope, isActive which backend rejects as 'property should not exist'. Major schema mismatch between backend and dashboard.
